skipped_smoke_tests.name: ChatThreadViewModel
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Launch app. Ctrl+N new tab, select Persona, send message, Ctrl+N second tab, switch tabs, close tab, Ctrl+Shift+T reopen, toggle Thinking/Mute, font size buttons.

skipped_smoke_tests.name: Conversation View & Markdown Rendering
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Verify Markdown rendering: headings H1-H6, bold/italic, inline code, fenced code blocks with syntax highlighting, lists, links, tables, blockquotes, horizontal rules. Verify chat themes (Classic/Compact/Bubble). Verify relative timestamps.

skipped_smoke_tests.name: Streaming Response + Auto-Scroll + Message Actions + Error Handling
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Send message to LLM — verify streaming tokens. Scroll up during streaming — auto-scroll pause indicator. Scroll-to-bottom button. Stop preserves partial response. Copy MD/Rich. Regenerate. Disconnect internet — error banner with Retry. Reconnect — Retry works.
